title: PHASE 35.1 — Parent Title Sanity Patch
rationale: The Phase 35 parent calculator titles contained static-answer examples (e.g. 'See How $100K Grows to $265K in 20 Years'). This repeats the zero-click problem removed from tool variants — Google scrapes the example number from the title. Fix: describe what the calculator DOES, not what result it produces.

compound-interest.before: Compound Interest Calculator — See How $100K Grows to $265K in 20 Years
compound-interest.after: Compound Interest Calculator — Calculate Growth by Rate, Years & Contributions
compound-interest.problem: Title contains specific example result — same zero-click pattern as tool variants
compound-interest.fix: Describes calculator function (rate, years, contributions) without example numbers

mortgage-calculator.before: Mortgage Calculator — See Your Monthly Payment on Any Home ($200K, $500K, $900K)
mortgage-calculator.after: Mortgage Calculator — Estimate Monthly Payment, Interest & Amortization
mortgage-calculator.problem: Lists specific dollar amounts — creates exact-match expectations
mortgage-calculator.fix: Describes calculator function (payment, interest, amortization) without price anchors

loan-calculator.before: Loan Calculator — Calculate Any Monthly Payment: Personal, Auto, Student Loans
loan-calculator.after: Loan Calculator — Calculate Monthly Payment, Total Interest & Payoff Schedule
loan-calculator.problem: Lists loan types — narrows search intent
loan-calculator.fix: Describes calculator function (payment, interest, payoff schedule) — covers all loan types

code_change.location: ctrTitles object — compound-interest, mortgage-calculator, loan-calculator entries
